statements.text: OpenAI often introduces new features, enhancements, or product adjustments in response to competitive pressures, evolving user needs, or market opportunities.

children.name: Product Piloting
children.gate: Does the scene involve OpenAI piloting, testing, or limiting access to new features or products before a broader rollout?

statements.text: OpenAI often revises or refines its products and features in response to significant user feedback or dissatisfaction.
